description_long: This is a large, single-story bungalow set within a spacious, walled compound featuring manicured lawns, paved walkways, and several outdoor structures. The main building has a prominent, dark hip roof with a cross at the front, suggesting a possible religious or community function. The facade is adorned with symmetrical windows and decorative elements, while the side and rear elevations show a mix of large arched windows and solid wall sections. The property includes multiple gazebos, a fountain, and a parking area, all surrounded by a uniform fence. The grounds are meticulously landscaped, with geometric garden beds and paved paths connecting the various features. The overall design is formal and balanced, with clear zones for entry, recreation, and utility.
description: A large, single-story bungalow with a dark hip roof, set in a landscaped, walled compound featuring gazebos, a fountain, and paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, and a cross above the porch, with landscaped lawns and a fountain visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large arched windows, a gazebo, and the parking area adjacent to the main building.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back wall, additional garden features, and the full extent of the fenced compound.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing another large arched window, a gazebo, and more of the landscaped grounds and pathways.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with large arched side windows
